title: ranunculus aquatilis var. peduncularis
intro: Ranunculus aquatilis var. peduncularis, also known as the aquatic buttercup, is a variety of the water buttercup plant, which is a type of flowering plant that thrives in aquatic environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus aquatilis var. peduncularis include reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds.
